expenses.title: Expenses

habits.subtitle: Track your daily habits and build streaks.
habits.deleteDescSuffix: and all its completion history. This action cannot be undone.

kanban.subtitle: Manage your projects with boards.
kanban.noMatchDesc: Try a different search term or filter.
kanban.emptyDesc: Create your first kanban board to get started.
kanban.deleteDescSuffix: and all its columns and cards. This action cannot be undone.
kanban.deleteCardDesc: This will permanently delete this card. This action cannot be undone.
kanban.deleteColumnDesc: This will permanently delete this column and all its cards. This action cannot be undone.
kanban.formCardLabelsPlaceholder: Type a label and press Enter
pomodoro.title: Pomodoro Timer
pomodoro.subtitle: Focus with the Pomodoro Technique.
pomodoro.noSessions: No sessions yet. Start your first focus session!
pomodoro.clearDesc: This will permanently delete all your pomodoro session history. This action cannot be undone.
envVault.title: Env Vault
envVault.subtitle: Securely store and manage environment variables.
envVault.noMatchDesc: Try a different search term or environment filter.
envVault.emptyDesc: Create a vault to start storing environment variables.
envVault.deleteDescSuffix: and all its variables. This action cannot be undone.
envVault.emptyVars: No variables yet. Add one or import from a .env file.
jsonTools.title: JSON Tools
jsonTools.subtitle: Format, convert, compare, and visualize JSON and YAML.
jsonTools.emptyDesc: Use the tools above, then save your work for quick access.
jsonTools.deleteDesc: This will permanently delete this document. This action cannot be undone.

sqlPractice.subtitle: Practice SQL queries with interactive challenges.
sqlPractice.challengeSolvedDesc: Great job! You've mastered this challenge.
sqlPractice.queryPlanPlaceholder: Run the plan to see execution details
sqlPractice.noSolutions: No solutions found yet. Be the first!
sqlPractice.previewNote: This is a preview. Press Submit to record your solution.
sqlPractice.selectTable: Select a table to preview data
sqlPractice.columnCountMismatch: Column count mismatch: Expected {expected}, but got {actual}.
sqlPractice.columnNamesMismatch: Column names do not match the expected result.
sqlPractice.rowCountMismatch: Row count mismatch: Expected {expected} rows, but got {actual}.
sqlPractice.dataMismatch: The data in your result doesn't match the expected output.
sqlPractice.cheatSheetSubtitle: Complete SQL reference from basics to advanced, covering all categories.
sqlAcademy.title: SQL Academy
sqlAcademy.subtitle: Master the language of data. From your first query to complex joins, we'll guide you through every step with interactive lessons.
sqlAcademy.cheatSheetDesc: Check out our SQL Cheat Sheet for syntax and common commands.
calculator.title: Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Developer-friendly calculator with persistent history.
calculator.clearDesc: This will permanently delete all calculation history. This action cannot be undone.
adminUsers.title: User Management
adminUsers.subtitle: Manage user accounts, roles, and access.
adminUsers.deleteDescSuffix: and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
adminSnippets.title: Snippets Moderation
adminSnippets.subtitle: Review and verify public code snippets.
adminSnippets.allPublicDesc: Verify snippets to mark them as reviewed and safe.
adminSnippets.deleteDesc: This will permanently delete this snippet. This action cannot be undone.
adminNav.title: Menu Manager
adminNav.subtitle: Control which modules are visible in the sidebar for all users.
adminNav.adminNoteDesc: Hiding a menu item only removes it from the sidebar. The direct URL path will still be accessible. To completely disable a module, use the Feature Toggles in Settings.
adminStats.title: System Stats
adminStats.subtitle: Overview of platform usage and growth.
adminSettings.title: Admin Settings
adminSettings.subtitle: Configure system-wide settings, announcements, and feature toggles.
adminSettings.maintenanceDesc: When enabled, a maintenance banner may be shown to users.
adminSettings.announcementDesc: Show a banner message to all users.
adminSettings.featureTogglesDesc: Enable or disable individual modules for all users.
adminChallenges.title: SQL Challenges
adminChallenges.subtitle: Create, edit, and manage SQL practice challenges.
adminChallenges.testRequired: Table schema and solution SQL are required to test
dbExplorer.title: Database Explorer
dbExplorer.subtitle: Connect to PostgreSQL databases, explore schemas, and run queries.
dbExplorer.selectConnectionToView: Select a connection to view schema
dbExplorer.deleteConnectionDesc: This will permanently delete "{name}" and all its saved queries and history. This action cannot be undone.
dbExplorer.deleteSavedQueryDesc: This will permanently delete "{name}". This action cannot be undone.
dbExplorer.clearHistoryDesc: This will permanently delete all query history entries. This action cannot be undone.
dbExplorer.dangerousQueryDesc: This query appears to be a destructive operation (DROP, TRUNCATE, DELETE). Are you sure you want to execute it?
dbExplorer.runQueryToSee: Run a query to see results
apiPlayground.title: API Playground
apiPlayground.subtitle: Select or create a request to get started.
apiPlayground.deleteCollectionDesc: This will delete "{name}". Requests in this collection will become uncollected. This action cannot be undone.
apiPlayground.deleteRequestDesc: This will permanently delete "{name}". This action cannot be undone.
apiPlayground.sendToSeeResponse: Send a request to see the response here.
timeTracker.pageSubtitle: Track time, manage projects, and generate invoices.
timeTracker.noEntriesTodayDesc: Start a timer or add a manual entry to get going.
timeTracker.noTimeEntriesDesc: Start tracking your time to see entries here.
timeTracker.noInvoicesDesc: Create an invoice from your tracked time.
timeTracker.noClientsDesc: Add clients to link them with projects and invoices.
timeTracker.noProjectsDesc: Create a project to start tracking time.
timeTracker.deleteClientDesc: This will permanently delete "{name}". Projects linked to this client will lose their client reference.
timeTracker.deleteProjectDesc: This will permanently delete "{name}" and all its time entries. This action cannot be undone.
timeTracker.deleteEntryDesc: This will permanently delete this time entry. This action cannot be undone.
timeTracker.deleteInvoiceDesc: This will permanently delete invoice {number}. This action cannot be undone.
timeTracker.invoiceNotesPlaceholder: Payment terms, thank you note, etc.
marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Browse and purchase code snippets from other developers.
marketplace.noMatchDesc: Try a different search term or language.
marketplace.emptyDesc: Be the first to list a snippet on the marketplace.
marketplace.fullCodeLocked: Purchase this listing to access the full source code.
marketplace.deleteReviewDesc: This will permanently delete your review. This action cannot be undone.
marketplace.noListingsDesc: Create your first listing to start selling snippets.
marketplace.deleteListingDesc: This will permanently delete "{title}" and all associated purchases and reviews. This action cannot be undone.
marketplace.purchasesSubtitle: Snippets you have purchased from the marketplace.
marketplace.noPurchasesDesc: Browse the marketplace to find useful code snippets.
marketplace.formTagsPlaceholder: Type a tag and press Enter
marketplace.formCommentPlaceholder: Share your thoughts about this snippet...
workflows.title: Workflows
workflows.subtitle: Build and run automated workflows.
workflows.noMatchDesc: Try a different search term or filter.
workflows.emptyDesc: Create your first workflow to automate tasks.
workflows.deleteDesc: This will permanently delete "{name}" and all its run history. This action cannot be undone.
workflows.cronHelp: Standard cron format (minute hour day month weekday)
workflows.webhookHelp: Send a POST request to this URL to trigger the workflow.
workflows.noNodes: No nodes yet. Add a node to start building your workflow.
workflows.transformDesc: This node passes through data from the previous step without modification.
workflows.noRuns: No runs yet. Click "Run Now" to execute this workflow.
workflows.noStepLogs: No step logs for this run.
